input.title: Choose message broker for order events
input.context: Our e-commerce platform processes thousands of orders per day. We need a reliable way to propagate order state changes (placed, paid, shipped, delivered) to downstream services like inventory, notifications, and analytics without tight coupling.
decision_drivers: High throughput with low latency
At-least-once delivery guarantee
Replay capability for event sourcing
Operational simplicity for a 3-person platform team

input.title: Select database for transaction ledger
input.context: Our payments platform records financial transactions that must never be lost or corrupted. We need ACID guarantees, auditability, and the ability to run complex reconciliation queries across millions of rows.
decision_drivers: ACID compliance is mandatory
Strong consistency over eventual consistency
Support for complex SQL joins for reconciliation
PCI-DSS audit trail requirements
Cost efficiency at 50M rows/month

input.title: Adopt API gateway pattern for patient data services
input.context: The patient portal currently calls 12 backend microservices directly from the React frontend. This causes CORS issues, token proliferation, and makes it hard to enforce HIPAA data access policies consistently.
decision_drivers: Centralized HIPAA access control enforcement
Reduce frontend complexity (single origin)
Rate limiting to prevent data scraping
Observability and audit logging for all PHI access

input.title: Multi-tenancy isolation strategy
input.context: We are building a B2B SaaS product serving mid-market enterprises. Customers have strict data isolation requirements and some have contractual obligations that their data cannot be co-mingled with other tenants.
decision_drivers: Data isolation guarantees for enterprise compliance
Cost efficiency (pooled resources where possible)
Onboarding new tenants in under 5 minutes
Schema evolution without cross-tenant risk
options_considered: Shared database, separate schemas per tenant
Hybrid: pooled for SMB, dedicated for enterprise

input.title: Frontend architecture for product catalog
input.context: The product catalog page is the highest traffic page in our store, serving 2M page views per day. Current SSR approach causes high TTFB during sale events. We need to improve performance without sacrificing SEO.
decision_drivers: SEO indexability is non-negotiable
Sub-200ms TTFB at peak load
Incremental static regeneration for price updates
Team familiarity with React ecosystem
options_considered: Next.js ISR with CDN edge caching
Pure CSR with prerendering for Googlebot

input.title: Real-time fraud scoring architecture
input.context: We need to score every payment transaction for fraud risk within 150ms. Current batch ML model runs overnight and misses real-time fraud patterns. We need a streaming inference pipeline that integrates with our checkout flow.
decision_drivers: P99 latency under 150ms including model inference
Model hot-reload without service restart
Feature store for consistent training/serving features
Fallback strategy when model is unavailable
options_considered: Feast feature store + Triton inference server
Redis-based rule engine with periodic model refresh

input.title: FHIR data exchange strategy
input.context: We need to integrate with 15 different hospital EHR systems (Epic, Cerner, Meditech) for patient record retrieval. Each system has different APIs and data formats. We need a normalized internal representation.
decision_drivers: HL7 FHIR R4 as canonical internal format
Support for both push (webhooks) and pull (scheduled sync) patterns
Idempotent ingestion to handle duplicate deliveries
Transformation auditability for debugging mapping errors
options_considered: Custom FHIR facade service per EHR vendor

input.title: Analytics data warehouse selection
input.context: Our product analytics team needs a warehouse to power customer-facing usage dashboards. Queries range from simple counts to complex cohort retention analyses. Data volume is 500GB today, projected to 10TB in 2 years.
decision_drivers: Query performance on cold data under 10 seconds
Cost predictability for customer-facing queries
dbt compatibility for transformation layer
Easy connection to our existing Postgres operational DB via CDC

input.title: Route optimization algorithm selection
input.context: Our last-mile delivery platform dispatches 500 drivers daily across metro areas. We currently use a greedy nearest-neighbor algorithm that produces routes 15-20% longer than optimal. We need to improve fleet efficiency.
decision_drivers: Solution quality: routes within 5% of optimal
Computation time under 30 seconds for 500 stops
Support for time window constraints
Team capability: no dedicated OR researcher on staff
options_considered: Google Maps Platform Routes Optimization API

input.title: Product search engine selection
input.context: Customer search is the primary product discovery mechanism, driving 60% of conversions. The current MySQL LIKE query approach returns poor results and cannot handle typos, synonyms, or faceted filtering at scale.
decision_drivers: Relevance tuning capability (BM25 + vector hybrid)
Faceted filtering with real-time index updates
Handles 10M product catalog with <100ms response
Managed service preferred to reduce ops burden

input.title: Video conferencing infrastructure for telehealth
input.context: Our telehealth platform needs HIPAA-compliant video calls between patients and clinicians. We serve rural areas with variable connectivity. Current third-party vendor has 99.5% uptime which is insufficient for clinical consultations.
decision_drivers: HIPAA Business Associate Agreement available
Adaptive bitrate for low-bandwidth rural connections
99.95%+ uptime SLA
Recording with end-to-end encryption for visit notes

input.title: Notification delivery infrastructure
input.context: Our platform needs to send transactional emails, push notifications, and in-app notifications reliably. We currently use three separate vendors with no unified tracking. Marketing wants a unified delivery status for user engagement analysis.
decision_drivers: Unified API across email, push, and in-app channels
Delivery receipt tracking with webhook callbacks
Template management with A/B testing
Cost at 10M notifications/month
options_considered: Custom service with SendGrid + Firebase + WebSockets

input.title: Open banking API aggregation strategy
input.context: Our personal finance app needs read access to users' bank accounts across 3,000+ US financial institutions. Building direct integrations is not feasible. We need a reliable aggregation layer with strong data freshness guarantees.
decision_drivers: Coverage of major US banks and credit unions
OAuth-based account linking (not credential scraping)
Webhook delivery for real-time transaction notifications
SOC 2 Type II certified vendor

input.title: Inventory reservation strategy for flash sales
input.context: Flash sales cause thundering herd on our inventory service. During a 10-minute sale window, we see 50,000 concurrent users attempting to purchase limited stock. Current optimistic locking causes massive transaction retry storms.
decision_drivers: Prevent overselling under extreme concurrency
Reserve inventory within 200ms
Auto-release stale reservations after 10 minutes
Consistency: user must see accurate remaining stock count
options_considered: Redis DECR with Lua script for atomic reservation
Dedicated reservation microservice with in-memory state

input.title: IoT telemetry ingestion pipeline
input.context: We have 20,000 GPS tracking devices in delivery vehicles sending location pings every 30 seconds. We need to ingest, store, and serve real-time location to our dispatcher dashboard with under 5-second latency.
decision_drivers: Ingest 20,000 messages/minute with room to grow to 200,000
Time-series storage optimized for geo queries
WebSocket push to dispatcher dashboard
7-day hot storage, 2-year cold archive
options_considered: AWS IoT Core + Timestream + API Gateway WebSocket
MQTT broker (EMQX) + TimescaleDB + custom WebSocket service
Google Cloud IoT Core + BigQuery + Datastream

input.title: Authentication and authorization framework
input.context: Our SaaS app currently has a homegrown JWT auth system. We are adding SSO for enterprise customers, MFA requirements, and fine-grained RBAC. The current system cannot support these requirements without significant rework.
decision_drivers: SAML 2.0 and OIDC SSO support for enterprise
MFA with TOTP and WebAuthn
Fine-grained RBAC at resource level
Audit log of all authentication events

input.title: Clinical note NLP pipeline
input.context: Clinicians write unstructured SOAP notes. We need to extract structured data (diagnoses, medications, procedures) from these notes to populate discrete EHR fields and support billing code suggestion.
decision_drivers: HIPAA-compliant: PHI must not leave our AWS boundary
Named entity recognition for medical terminology (ICD-10, SNOMED CT)
Processing latency under 3 seconds per note
Human review workflow for low-confidence extractions
options_considered: AWS Comprehend Medical (managed, stays in AWS)

input.title: Cryptographic key management for digital assets
input.context: Our custody platform holds private keys for customer digital asset wallets. A compromise would be catastrophic. We need a key management system that meets institutional custody security standards and our SOC 2 Type II requirements.
decision_drivers: FIPS 140-2 Level 3 certified HSM
Multi-party computation (MPC) for key signing
Air-gapped key ceremony for root key generation
Disaster recovery with geographically distributed key shards

input.title: Product recommendation engine approach
input.context: We want to add personalized product recommendations to improve average order value. We have 2 years of purchase history and browsing data for 5M users. The data science team is small (2 ML engineers).
decision_drivers: Recommendation quality (CTR and conversion lift)
Cold start handling for new users and new products
Real-time personalization with sub-100ms serving latency
Operational burden on the small ML team
options_considered: Custom collaborative filtering model on SageMaker

input.title: Warehouse management system integration pattern
input.context: We are integrating with 8 third-party warehouse management systems (WMS) used by our fulfillment partners. Each WMS has a different API (REST, SOAP, EDI X12, flat file FTP). We need a normalized integration layer.
decision_drivers: Support for REST, SOAP, EDI, and file-based integrations
Dead letter queue for failed messages with retry
Mapping transformations must be auditable and version-controlled
New WMS integration deployable in under 1 week
options_considered: AWS Step Functions + Lambda per connector

input.title: Usage-based billing metering system
input.context: We are transitioning from seat-based to usage-based pricing. We need to meter API calls, compute minutes, and data transfer per tenant. Billing must be accurate to within 0.1% and we cannot afford to double-bill or miss events.
decision_drivers: Exactly-once metering semantics
Handles 1M metering events per hour
Tamper-evident audit trail for dispute resolution
Integration with Stripe Billing for invoicing
options_considered: Custom metering service with Kafka + Postgres

input.title: Genomic data storage and query architecture
input.context: We process whole genome sequencing files (WGS) averaging 100GB per sample. Researchers need to query variants across thousands of samples to identify disease associations. Storage and query costs are becoming unsustainable.
decision_drivers: Efficient storage of VCF and CRAM formats
Federated queries across samples without full data movement
Access control at the sample level for consent compliance
Cost reduction of at least 60% vs current S3 + Athena approach
options_considered: TileDB-VCF on S3 with serverless query
Custom Parquet-based variant store on Iceberg

input.title: Regulatory reporting pipeline architecture
input.context: As a registered broker-dealer, we must submit daily FINRA transaction reports and monthly CFTC position reports. Reports have strict format specifications and must be delivered by regulatory deadlines. Late or incorrect submissions incur significant fines.
decision_drivers: Zero missed submission windows
Report format validation before submission
Reconciliation against source systems before each submission
Audit trail with immutable storage of every submitted report
options_considered: Custom pipeline: Airflow + dbt + SFTP delivery
Custom pipeline: Temporal + Postgres + encrypted S3 archive
FIS Regulatory Reporting as a Service

input.title: Returns processing workflow engine
input.context: Our returns process involves multiple steps: label generation, carrier pickup, warehouse inspection, refund approval, and restocking. Currently implemented as a monolithic state machine in Postgres that is difficult to extend and has no visibility into in-flight returns.
decision_drivers: Visual workflow visibility for operations team
Compensation and rollback for failed steps
Human-in-the-loop steps for inspection disputes
SLA monitoring with alerts for stuck returns
options_considered: Refactored Postgres state machine with pg_cron

input.title: Document intelligence pipeline for contract analysis
input.context: Legal teams upload contracts for automated clause extraction and risk flagging. Documents are PDFs averaging 50 pages with complex layouts. We need to extract structured data with high accuracy to reduce manual review time.
decision_drivers: Layout-aware extraction (tables, headers, multi-column)
Custom model fine-tuning for legal clause taxonomy
Human review queue for low-confidence extractions
Data residency: documents cannot leave US AWS regions

input.title: Driver dispatch communication channel
input.context: Dispatchers communicate with 500 active drivers through a legacy PTT radio system that is being decommissioned. We need a digital replacement that works in dead-zones (tunnels, parking garages) and supports file attachments for delivery instructions.
decision_drivers: Offline message queuing and sync when connectivity returns
Push-to-talk voice messaging with <500ms latency on 4G
File attachment support for delivery instructions (PDF, image)
Read receipts for critical dispatch messages
options_considered: Custom solution: MQTT + WebRTC + React Native

input.title: Remote patient monitoring data ingestion
input.context: We are onboarding patients with chronic conditions who use Bluetooth medical devices (glucose meters, blood pressure cuffs, pulse oximeters). Device readings must reach clinical dashboards within 5 minutes of measurement.
decision_drivers: Device SDK support for major BLE medical device manufacturers
HIPAA-compliant data transit and storage
Alerting when readings exceed clinical thresholds
Battery-efficient mobile SDK (< 3% battery drain/day)
options_considered: Custom BLE SDK + AWS IoT Core

input.title: Real-time collaborative editing architecture
input.context: We are adding collaborative document editing to our project management tool. Multiple users need to edit the same document simultaneously with conflict-free merge semantics and presence indicators.
decision_drivers: Conflict-free merging without manual conflict resolution
Presence indicators (cursors, selections) with <100ms propagation
Offline editing with sync when reconnected
Historical version tracking with per-character attribution

input.title: KYC identity verification vendor selection
input.context: Our investment platform is legally required to verify customer identity (KYC) before account funding. Manual review is not scalable beyond 100 signups/day. We need automated document verification with liveness detection to prevent identity fraud.
decision_drivers: Government ID document coverage for 50+ countries
Liveness detection accuracy > 99.9% (ISO 30107-3 certified)
Automated adverse media and PEP screening
API integration completable in 2 weeks

input.title: Dynamic pricing engine architecture
input.context: We want to implement demand-based pricing that adjusts product prices in real-time based on inventory levels, competitor prices, and demand signals. This is a new capability with no existing system to build on.
decision_drivers: Price changes propagate to storefront within 30 seconds
Pricing rules are configurable by merchandisers without code changes
Competitor price feeds from at least 5 sources
Audit log of every price change with reasoning
options_considered: Custom rules engine with competitor price feed integration

input.context: We need to make a decision.

input.title: Choose a database
decision_drivers: Performance

input.title: Decide on cloud provider
input.context: We need to pick a cloud provider for our new product.
decision_drivers: Cost
Region availability

input.title: A
input.context: x
decision_drivers: a

input.title: A title that is extremely long and contains many words that would produce a very lengthy slug if not properly truncated by the system under evaluation during slug generation
input.context: This tests slug truncation behavior for very long titles.
decision_drivers: Slug length limits
URL safety
